assessment.note: He names a specific condition for moving faster—specific, fast feedback—showing clear clarity friction, with some engagement preserved because he responds quickly when support is timely.

new_queue.label: Specific fast feedback
new_queue.name: Specific and fast feedback — where is that missing most right now?
new_queue.description: Drills into the exact point in his workflow where feedback speed or specificity is breaking down.

new_queue.label: Ship-time hesitation
new_queue.name: What tends to make shipping feel risky right before you send it?
new_queue.description: Gets at the specific trigger for late reassurance-seeking and hesitation.

new_queue.label: Tooling friction
new_queue.name: What part of your workflow is slowing you down most right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces process or tooling friction that may be masquerading as confidence issues.

new_queue.label: Go-to people
new_queue.name: Who do you already feel comfortable going to when you get stuck?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether he has a usable support network or is still trying to solve everything alone.

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what would you want to tighten up first?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the discussion into a concrete near-term focus without introducing new topics.
